title: join_from_welcome_for_group silently overwrites existing group state
description: In mls.rs join_from_welcome_for_group, self.groups.insert(group_id.to_vec(), group) unconditionally replaces any existing group entry for that ID. If a replayed Welcome (from an earlier epoch) is delivered after the client has already joined, the existing group is silently overwritten with an old-epoch group, rolling back the MLS epoch and invalidating all keys derived from newer epochs. No error is returned. Fix: check has_group_id before inserting and return Err if the group already exists.
